settings.heading: Help Center
settings.description: Please use the below form. You can also call customer service on +1(973) 435-3638.

settings.heading: Contact Us
settings.description:
If you have an issue or question that requires immediate assistance, you can click the button below to chat live with a Customer Service representative.

Please allow 3 - 5 business days from the time your package arrives back to us for a refund to be issued.

settings.heading: Customer Say!
settings.description: Customers love our products and we always strive to please them all.

settings.name: Carie-Gosée H.
settings.quote: These are sooo pretty and very comfy. Perfect color as well. I love wearing these with a neutral top and Chelsea boots. Wicked cute... 😍

settings.name: Cameron Smith.
settings.quote: A perfect product, it keeps you very warm without over heating. True to size, I couldn't be happier with the purchase... Thank you! 🤗

settings.name: Algistino Lionel.
settings.quote: A fantastic purchase. The product provides just the right amount of warmth without causing overheating. Highly recommend! 🥰
